# Function reference {.doc .doc-index}

## Painting local ancestry

The high-level entry point: fit the ancestry CTMC on the reference tips and paint the
query haplotypes. `paint` returns a `Painting`; `fit` exposes the EM directly.


| | |
| --- | --- |
| [paint](paint.qmd#tspaint.paint) | Infer soft local ancestry along query haplotypes from a tree sequence. |
| [Painting](Painting.qmd#tspaint.Painting) | Result of :func:`paint`: the soft local-ancestry posteriors plus the fitted model. |
| [fit](fit.qmd#tspaint.fit) | Blocked EM for ``(Q, π, {w_i})`` (CLAUDE.md §3, §11.1.5-6). |
| [FitResult](FitResult.qmd#tspaint.FitResult) | Fitted parameters returned by :func:`fit`. |

## Output & segmentation

The soft per-haplotype posterior (`Segment` tracks) and its collapse into hard ancestry
tracts for downstream tract-length / admixture-dating analysis.


| | |
| --- | --- |
| [output.posterior_table](output.posterior_table.qmd#tspaint.output.posterior_table) | Per-sample ancestry posterior as contiguous segments covering ``[0, L)``. |
| [output.hard_segments](output.hard_segments.qmd#tspaint.output.hard_segments) | Collapse a soft posterior ``track`` into hard ancestry segments. |
| [output.Segment](output.Segment.qmd#tspaint.output.Segment) | A contiguous span carrying one soft ancestry posterior. |
| [output.missing_info_mask](output.missing_info_mask.qmd#tspaint.output.missing_info_mask) | Per-sample spans where the tree is uninformative (isolated sample). |
| [output.posterior_at](output.posterior_at.qmd#tspaint.output.posterior_at) | Posterior vector for ``sample`` at a genomic ``position``. |

## Reference QC, introgression & archaic detection

Audit a reference panel for admixture / mislabelling, flag foreign tracts of any
haplotype without naming a donor, detect introgression from an unsampled ("ghost")
source, and — with no reference at all — detect deep archaic tracts (the
`tspaint.introgression` and `tspaint.archaic` namespaces). All read the leave-one-out
map, which surfaces a sample's own foreign tracts the down-pass posterior hides;
`detect_ghost` and `detect_archaic` return objects with a shared `.burden` / `.tracts()`.


| | |
| --- | --- |
| [reference_qc](reference_qc.qmd#tspaint.reference_qc) | Audit a reference panel for admixture / mislabelling (Plan A Workflow 1; CLAUDE.md §9). |
| [foreign_tracts](foreign_tracts.qmd#tspaint.foreign_tracts) | Anonymous foreign-tract inference: where a haplotype is foreign to its expectation |
| [detect_ghost](detect_ghost.qmd#tspaint.detect_ghost) | Ghost-source detection: tracts from a population **not in the panel** (Plan A Workflow 3). |
| [detect_archaic](detect_archaic.qmd#tspaint.detect_archaic) | Reference-free archaic / ghost detection via a depth-emission HMM (Plan B). |
| [output.loo_posterior_table](output.loo_posterior_table.qmd#tspaint.output.loo_posterior_table) | Per-sample **leave-one-out** ancestry posterior as contiguous segments. |
| [introgression.ReferenceQC](introgression.ReferenceQC.qmd#tspaint.introgression.ReferenceQC) | Result of :func:`reference_qc` — a per-reference admixture/mislabel audit. |
| [introgression.GhostResult](introgression.GhostResult.qmd#tspaint.introgression.GhostResult) | Result of :func:`detect_ghost` — per-sample ghost tracts + genome-wide burden. |
| [introgression.foreignness_track](introgression.foreignness_track.qmd#tspaint.introgression.foreignness_track) | Per-sample foreignness components as contiguous segments covering ``[0, L)``. |
| [archaic.ArchaicResult](archaic.ArchaicResult.qmd#tspaint.archaic.ArchaicResult) | Result of :func:`detect_archaic`. |

## Validation metrics

Accuracy, calibration, and fragmentation / tract-length metrics for simulated-truth
experiments (the `tspaint.metrics` namespace).


| | |
| --- | --- |
| [validate.balanced_accuracy](validate.balanced_accuracy.qmd#tspaint.validate.balanced_accuracy) | Mean of per-true-class painting accuracies. |
| [validate.per_base_accuracy](validate.per_base_accuracy.qmd#tspaint.validate.per_base_accuracy) | Span-weighted per-base painting accuracy. |
| [validate.mean_confidence](validate.mean_confidence.qmd#tspaint.validate.mean_confidence) | Span-weighted mean painter confidence ``\|2*P(state) - 1\|``. |
| [validate.reliability_curve](validate.reliability_curve.qmd#tspaint.validate.reliability_curve) | Calibration curve of ``P(state)``: predicted vs. empirical per bin. |
| [validate.breakpoint_precision_recall](validate.breakpoint_precision_recall.qmd#tspaint.validate.breakpoint_precision_recall) | Precision/recall of inferred ancestry switch points vs. truth. |
| [validate.switch_density](validate.switch_density.qmd#tspaint.validate.switch_density) | Ancestry switches per unit length. |
| [validate.tract_boundary_error](validate.tract_boundary_error.qmd#tspaint.validate.tract_boundary_error) | Tract-boundary localization error against the truth. |
| [validate.breakpoint_flicker](validate.breakpoint_flicker.qmd#tspaint.validate.breakpoint_flicker) | Posterior discontinuity across a sample's segment boundaries (CLAUDE.md §7.3). |
| [validate.map_truth](validate.map_truth.qmd#tspaint.validate.map_truth) | Remap truth tracts from population ids to ancestry-state indices. |

## Comparators (head-to-head)

Painters scored on equal footing by a uniform harness — the full method, a runnable
ARG-native baseline, and the RFMix incumbent (the `tspaint.compare` namespace).


| | |
| --- | --- |
| [compare.tspaint_paint](compare.tspaint_paint.qmd#tspaint.compare.tspaint_paint) | Paint queries with the full tspaint method (EM fit + down-pass posterior). |
| [compare.nearest_reference_paint](compare.nearest_reference_paint.qmd#tspaint.compare.nearest_reference_paint) | Paint queries by their nearest labelled reference (ARG-native baseline). |
| [compare.rfmix_paint](compare.rfmix_paint.qmd#tspaint.compare.rfmix_paint) | RFMix painter with the standard ``painter(ts, labels, queries)`` signature. |
| [compare.head_to_head](compare.head_to_head.qmd#tspaint.compare.head_to_head) | Score a panel of painters on one admixture scenario across ARG substrates. |
| [compare.score_painter](compare.score_painter.qmd#tspaint.compare.score_painter) | Run a painter on ``ts`` and score it against the truth. |

## Input front ends

Obtain a tspaint-ready tree sequence from genotypes (the `tspaint.io` namespace). The
inference front ends `tsinfer` and `singer` take the same `source` — a tree sequence, a
VCF Zarr, or a VCF; `relate` converts Relate `.anc` / `.mut` output. (The pre-unification
names `infer_tree_sequence` / `singer_tree_sequences` / `convert_relate` remain as
deprecated aliases.)


| | |
| --- | --- |
| [io.tsinfer](io.tsinfer.qmd#tspaint.io.tsinfer) | Infer a tree sequence from genotypes via tsinfer (CLAUDE.md §5, §9). |
| [io.relate](io.relate.qmd#tspaint.io.relate) | Convert Relate output (``.anc`` / ``.mut``) to a tskit tree sequence (CLAUDE.md §5). |
| [io.singer](io.singer.qmd#tspaint.io.singer) | Sample posterior ARGs from genotypes via SINGER (CLAUDE.md §7.4). |
| [io.add_mutations](io.add_mutations.qmd#tspaint.io.add_mutations) | Overlay biallelic mutations on a tree sequence so the inference front ends have variant |
| [io.write_haploid_vcf](io.write_haploid_vcf.qmd#tspaint.io.write_haploid_vcf) | Write one haploid VCF column per sample node. |
| [io.check_persistence](io.check_persistence.qmd#tspaint.io.check_persistence) | Run the §5.1 persistence go/no-go on an already-loaded tree sequence. |
| [io_genotypes.Variants](io_genotypes.Variants.qmd#tspaint.io_genotypes.Variants) | A tool-agnostic biallelic variant matrix (one column per **haplotype**). |

## Horizontal BP/EP smoother

The §7 horizontal coupling — a genome-axis forward-backward over each tip's per-tree
beliefs that suppresses spurious switches on inferred ARGs (the `tspaint.bp` namespace;
also `paint(smooth=True)`).


| | |
| --- | --- |
| [bp.bp_paint](bp.bp_paint.qmd#tspaint.bp.bp_paint) | tspaint painter with horizontal BP smoothing. |
| [bp.bp_smooth](bp.bp_smooth.qmd#tspaint.bp.bp_smooth) | Forward-backward over per-segment beliefs along the genome. |
| [bp.bp_smooth_track](bp.bp_smooth_track.qmd#tspaint.bp.bp_smooth_track) | Smooth one tip's :class:`~tspaint.output.Segment` track along the genome. |
| [bp.bp_vs_deadband_experiment](bp.bp_vs_deadband_experiment.qmd#tspaint.bp.bp_vs_deadband_experiment) | Compare BP smoothing vs the deadband for segmentation, over ``seeds``. |

## Admixture dating (rate through time)

An optional, separate deliverable from painting: a time-inhomogeneous directional
mugration EM that estimates the cross-ancestry transition rates `q_AB(t)`, `q_BA(t)` as
functions of (backward) time — locating divergence / gene-flow epochs and their direction
(the `tspaint.dating` namespace; also `Painting.rate_through_time()`).


| | |
| --- | --- |
| [fit_rate_through_time](fit_rate_through_time.qmd#tspaint.fit_rate_through_time) | Fit the time-inhomogeneous directional admixture-rate-through-time profile by EM. |
| [RateThroughTime](RateThroughTime.qmd#tspaint.RateThroughTime) | Result of :func:`fit_rate_through_time` — the directional cross-ancestry rate profile. |
| [dating.paint_qt](dating.paint_qt.qmd#tspaint.dating.paint_qt) | Paint focal tips under a time-**inhomogeneous** generator ``Q_of_cell`` — the same |
| [dating.rate_through_time_binned](dating.rate_through_time_binned.qmd#tspaint.dating.rate_through_time_binned) | Stage-1 admixture-rate-through-time profile: fit a homogeneous ``Q``, then bin the |
| [dating.make_Q_of_cell](dating.make_Q_of_cell.qmd#tspaint.dating.make_Q_of_cell) | Build a ``cell_index -> (2,2) generator`` callable from per-cell directional rates. |
| [dating.directional_rate_splines](dating.directional_rate_splines.qmd#tspaint.dating.directional_rate_splines) | Fit ``q_AB(t)`` and ``q_BA(t)`` by GCV-selected penalised Poisson splines. |
| [dating.fit_poisson_spline](dating.fit_poisson_spline.qmd#tspaint.dating.fit_poisson_spline) | Penalised Poisson log-spline via penalised IRLS. |
| [dating.select_lambda_gcv](dating.select_lambda_gcv.qmd#tspaint.dating.select_lambda_gcv) | Fit at a grid of smoothing parameters; pick the one minimising GCV. |
| [dating.log_time_grid](dating.log_time_grid.qmd#tspaint.dating.log_time_grid) | Geometric (log-spaced) cell edges spanning ``[t_min, t_max]``. |
| [dating.split_branch](dating.split_branch.qmd#tspaint.dating.split_branch) | Split a branch ``[t_c, t_p]`` (``t_c < t_p``) into per-cell sub-intervals. |
| [dating.branch_cell_stats](dating.branch_cell_stats.qmd#tspaint.dating.branch_cell_stats) | Per-cell endpoint-conditioned expected dwell and directional jumps for one branch. |
| [dating.composite_transition](dating.composite_transition.qmd#tspaint.dating.composite_transition) | Composite parent→child transition ``∏ expm(Q_k·d_k)`` for a branch under a |

## Simulation (known truth)

msprime admixture scenarios with census-event ground truth — the primary validation
track and the source of examples.


| | |
| --- | --- |
| [simulate_admixture](simulate_admixture.qmd#tspaint.simulate_admixture) | Simulate an admixed sample plus two reference panels. |
| [local_ancestry_truth](local_ancestry_truth.qmd#tspaint.local_ancestry_truth) | True local ancestry per sample as source-population tracts. |
| [sim.admixture_demography](sim.admixture_demography.qmd#tspaint.sim.admixture_demography) | Build a two-source admixture demography with a post-pulse census. |
| [sim.simulate_admixture_impure_refs](sim.simulate_admixture_impure_refs.qmd#tspaint.sim.simulate_admixture_impure_refs) | Simulate admixed queries, a pure reference anchor core, and impure reference panels. |
| [sim.simulate_admixture_with_ghost](sim.simulate_admixture_with_ghost.qmd#tspaint.sim.simulate_admixture_with_ghost) | Simulate admixed queries + A/B reference panels, with an **unsampled ghost source**. |
| [sim.admixture_demography_with_ghost](sim.admixture_demography_with_ghost.qmd#tspaint.sim.admixture_demography_with_ghost) | Two-source admixture with a third **unsampled ("ghost") source** ``C``. |

## Generators & model

The ancestry CTMC generator, transition matrices, stationary distribution, and tip
emission model.


| | |
| --- | --- |
| [make_generator_2state](make_generator_2state.qmd#tspaint.make_generator_2state) | Build the 2-state ancestry CTMC generator (CLAUDE.md §2.1). |
| [model.transition_matrix](model.transition_matrix.qmd#tspaint.model.transition_matrix) | Branch transition probabilities ``P(t) = expm(Q t)`` (CLAUDE.md §2.1). |
| [model.stationary_distribution](model.stationary_distribution.qmd#tspaint.model.stationary_distribution) | Stationary distribution ``π`` of a CTMC generator. |
| [model.tip_emission](model.tip_emission.qmd#tspaint.model.tip_emission) | Soft-clamp emission for a labelled tip (CLAUDE.md §2.2). |
| [model.query_emission](model.query_emission.qmd#tspaint.model.query_emission) | Flat / root-frequency emission for an unlabelled query tip (CLAUDE.md §2.2). |
| [model.validate_generator](model.validate_generator.qmd#tspaint.model.validate_generator) | Check that ``Q`` is a valid CTMC generator. |

## Experiment drivers

End-to-end drivers used to produce the validation results (the `tspaint.experiments`
namespace).


| | |
| --- | --- |
| [experiments.admixture_experiment](experiments.admixture_experiment.qmd#tspaint.experiments.admixture_experiment) | Simulate admixture, fit hard-clamp EM on the references, paint the queries, score. |
| [experiments.age_sweep](experiments.age_sweep.qmd#tspaint.experiments.age_sweep) | Accuracy vs. admixture age — the §9 headline. |
| [experiments.scaling_sweep](experiments.scaling_sweep.qmd#tspaint.experiments.scaling_sweep) | Runtime + correctness + flicker vs. sample size. |
| [experiments.fragmentation_experiment](experiments.fragmentation_experiment.qmd#tspaint.experiments.fragmentation_experiment) | Fragmentation / tract-length fidelity of hard segmentations vs. the true tracts. |
| [experiments.arg_ensemble_experiment](experiments.arg_ensemble_experiment.qmd#tspaint.experiments.arg_ensemble_experiment) | Merge LAI across an ensemble of inferred ARGs vs. a single inferred ARG. |
| [experiments.singer_ensemble_experiment](experiments.singer_ensemble_experiment.qmd#tspaint.experiments.singer_ensemble_experiment) | Merge LAI across **SINGER posterior** ARG samples vs. a single sample vs. truth. |
| [experiments.impure_reference_experiment](experiments.impure_reference_experiment.qmd#tspaint.experiments.impure_reference_experiment) | Hard-clamp vs strong-Beta-soft credibility for **slightly impure references**. |
| [experiments.impure_reference_sweep](experiments.impure_reference_sweep.qmd#tspaint.experiments.impure_reference_sweep) | Sweep :func:`impure_reference_experiment` across regimes (and seeds); tabulate the |
| [experiments.flicker_vs_true_boundaries](experiments.flicker_vs_true_boundaries.qmd#tspaint.experiments.flicker_vs_true_boundaries) | Split a sample's segment-boundary flicker into at-true vs. off-true boundaries. |

## ARG-posterior ensemble merge

Marginalise ARG uncertainty by averaging per-position paintings across a posterior
ensemble (e.g. SINGER samples).


| | |
| --- | --- |
| [ensemble.merge_posterior_tables](ensemble.merge_posterior_tables.qmd#tspaint.ensemble.merge_posterior_tables) | Average per-haplotype posteriors across an ensemble of paintings. |
| [ensemble.MergedSegment](ensemble.MergedSegment.qmd#tspaint.ensemble.MergedSegment) | One span of an ensemble-merged painting. |

## Lower-level machinery

The pieces underneath the EM: per-root pruning, edge-blocked sufficient statistics,
per-branch Van Loan reward integrals, the closed-form M-step, and persistence
diagnostics.


| | |
| --- | --- |
| [pruning.prune_tree](pruning.prune_tree.qmd#tspaint.pruning.prune_tree) | Prune every root of a marginal tree and aggregate the results. |
| [pruning.prune_root](pruning.prune_root.qmd#tspaint.pruning.prune_root) | Up/down sum-product pass for a single root of a marginal tree. |
| [accumulate.accumulate_sufficient_statistics](accumulate.accumulate_sufficient_statistics.qmd#tspaint.accumulate.accumulate_sufficient_statistics) | Single E-step sweep over the tree sequence (CLAUDE.md §3.3). |
| [branch_stats.branch_expected_stats](branch_stats.branch_expected_stats.qmd#tspaint.branch_stats.branch_expected_stats) | Endpoint-conditioned expected dwell times and jump counts on one branch. |
| [em.build_emissions](em.build_emissions.qmd#tspaint.em.build_emissions) | Build the per-sample Felsenstein emission vectors (CLAUDE.md §2.2). |
| [em.m_step_Q](em.m_step_Q.qmd#tspaint.em.m_step_Q) | Closed-form generator MLE from expected dwell times and jump counts. |
| [em.m_step_pi](em.m_step_pi.qmd#tspaint.em.m_step_pi) | Closed-form root-frequency MLE: ``π = S_root / Σ S_root`` (CLAUDE.md §3.4). |
| [em.m_step_w](em.m_step_w.qmd#tspaint.em.m_step_w) | Per-tip credibility MAP under a ``Beta(alpha, beta)`` prior (CLAUDE.md §3.4). |
| [ranked.ranked_tree_sequence](ranked.ranked_tree_sequence.qmd#tspaint.ranked.ranked_tree_sequence) | Copy of ``ts`` with node times replaced by the dense rank of each time. |
| [diagnostics.persistence_summary](diagnostics.persistence_summary.qmd#tspaint.diagnostics.persistence_summary) | Summary of internal-node persistence (the go/no-go on the method's premise). |
| [diagnostics.node_persistence](diagnostics.node_persistence.qmd#tspaint.diagnostics.node_persistence) | Number of distinct marginal trees in which each (internal) node appears. |
| [diagnostics.edge_span_summary](diagnostics.edge_span_summary.qmd#tspaint.diagnostics.edge_span_summary) | Summary of the tree-sequence edge-span distribution. |
